subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-04-08
subcodes.first_line: China, China, China, China-ward the Cause of Bahá'u'lláh must march! Where is that holy, sanctified Bahá'í
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause
